subject: Create data fixtures
description:
Build the JSON data layer that all three pages consume.

Walk the repo first: read CLAUDE.md for current state, fundforge.md trust score formula, design/frontend/src/components/showcase/showcase-data.js for data shape reference.

Work:
- Create data/ folder with fixture files (campaigns.json, profiles.json, donors.json, community.json - or whatever structure makes sense)
- Use AI to generate realistic, internally consistent content:
  - At least 3 campaigns with 500+ word stories, progress data, category badges
  - At least 2 organizer profiles with trust scores computed using the formula (fulfillment_rate * 0.4 + update_consistency * 0.3 + repeat_donor_confidence * 0.3)
  - At least 10 donors with names, amounts, timestamps
  - Community aggregate metrics that are mathematically consistent with individual campaign data
  - Leaderboard with weekly momentum percentages
- Ensure cross-references work: campaign.organizerId -> profile.id, donation.campaignId -> campaign.id
- Verify: import a fixture in a component and confirm data renders

Write back to CLAUDE.md:
- Data schema decisions (shape of each entity)
- How fixtures cross-reference each other
- Any content generation approach worth noting

changes: Created profiles.json: 4 organizer profiles with trust scores, verification tiers, stats, bios
Created campaigns.json: 23 campaigns (4 active with 500+ word stories, 17 funded, 2 unfunded) with updates and testimonials
Created donations.json: 15 donations across 4 active campaigns with names, amounts, timestamps, messages
Created community.json: precomputed aggregates ($970,600 total), leaderboard (ranked by raised*trust), trending (momentum > 20%)
Created data/index.js: re-exports + getProfile, getCampaign, getCampaignsByOrganizer, getDonationsByCampaign helpers
Downloaded 4 reference images locally to app/public/images/
Updated CLAUDE.md with data model docs
learnings: Campaign stories as string[] (array of paragraphs) is cleaner than \n-embedded strings for JSON + React rendering
Fulfillment rate as binary (funded/total) constrains what percentages are possible - must match actual campaign counts
Leaderboard ranking formula totalRaised*(trustScore/100) creates meaningful reordering vs pure dollar ranking
loose_ends: Images are shared across profiles (only 2 avatar URLs) - needs unique images per person in polish pass
Campaign hero images also shared - each campaign should have unique photos
Past campaigns have no story content (only summary) - acceptable for V1
